data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the upgrade path from installation-trusted identity to claimed Bizing account.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the upgrade path from installation-trusted identity to a claimed Bizing account. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this upgrade path but lacks specific evidence or endpoints that demonstrate its implementation or validation.
gaps: No evidence of the upgrade path from installation-trusted identity to claimed Bizing account.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
